entries.preferred_route: IR bg -> bg_map -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: bg is a patch-time route in the capability matrix
micro bg patch is the proof packet for Layer 0 background writes

manual_checks: Confirm the chosen background still matches the narrative beat in YMM4
limitations: Background asset choice remains a registry/operator judgement

entries.preferred_route: IR bg_anim -> timeline contract route -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: ImageItem X/Y/Zoom and ImageItem.VideoEffects routes are measured in repo-local contract profiles
bg_anim route measurement packet fixes the repo-local write routes
bg_anim has two approved patch paths: keyframes and VideoEffects

manual_checks: Check whether the pan/zoom strength is visually comfortable in the target scene
limitations: VideoEffects route depends on a measured profile; do not assume every ymmp corpus has the same background route

entries.preferred_route: IR overlay -> overlay_map -> timing anchor -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: overlay insertion packet fixes deterministic label/timing insertion
overlay is listed as a yes/write path in patch_ymmp

manual_checks: Confirm density, overlap, and final screen readability in YMM4
limitations: Overlay remains registry and timing-anchor dependent

entries.preferred_route: IR se -> se_map -> timing anchor -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: SE AudioItem insertion is implemented and documented
se is a conditional write path with mechanical failure classes

manual_checks: Check timing, loudness, and whether the SE is worth keeping in the final edit
limitations: SE still requires registry resolution and timing-anchor coverage

entries.preferred_route: canonical ymmp -> audit-skit-group

evidence.reason: Canonical skit_group artifact contains GroupItem remark 'haitatsuin_delivery_main' on Layer 9 with ImageItem-only children
Canonical adoption packet records audit-skit-group success against the canonical corpus

manual_checks: Confirm the left-facing base pose and center-relative composition still match the intended default actor stance
limitations: Derived native template assets are still pending; this proves the anchor, not the full template set

entries.preferred_route: IR group_motion + group_target -> group_motion_map -> GroupItem.X/Y/Zoom

evidence.reason: group_motion_only profile fixes GroupItem.X/Y/Zoom as the measured route
G-20 review fixes group_motion as geometry helper, not the acting mainline
group_motion is documented as a yes/write path with failure classes

manual_checks: Check whether the geometry nudge preserves scene composition and relative alignment
limitations: Use only as a geometry helper; do not replace canonical skit templates with repeated group_motion tweaks

entries.preferred_route: template intent -> skit_group_registry -> audit-skit-group

evidence.reason: Registry template defines skit intent 'deny_oneshot'
Skit group spec fixes template-first as the mainline
Canonical anchor is now repo-resident, but derived native template assets are still pending

manual_checks: X-axis only sway range
one-shot (no loop)
limitations: Current repo evidence proves canonical anchor existence plus preflight classification, but not a full repo-resident derived native template asset set
Run audit-skit-group before treating this intent as production-ready template resolution
Per-template fallback note exists (delivery_nod_v1), but preflight resolution uses top-level intent_fallbacks first

entries.preferred_route: IR motion + motion_target -> tachie_motion_map_library -> layer-specific VideoEffects

evidence.reason: motion_target layer:9 proof shows GroupItem-level VideoEffects writes in repo-local corpus
motion library v2 documents why animation params are needed for ImageItem/GroupItem targets
motion_target is documented as a direct write path to ImageItem/GroupItem

manual_checks: Confirm the whole actor still moves as intended and does not break face/body alignment
limitations: Supplementary route only; skit_group acting should start from template intent, not from raw motion_target edits

entries.preferred_route: IR face -> face_map/palette -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: G-06 records face patch as done and production proven
face changes are included in the tea-time E2E proof

manual_checks: Confirm the chosen label still reads correctly as a human expression in YMM4
limitations: Label naming remains human-authored; patch only resolves existing registry labels

entries.preferred_route: IR idle_face -> face_map/palette -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: G-07 records idle_face as done
idle_face insertion is part of the tea-time E2E proof

manual_checks: Check that non-speaker idle faces do not feel distracting in context
limitations: Idle face coverage still depends on palette completeness

entries.preferred_route: IR motion -> tachie_motion_map_library or motion_map -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: motion routes are measured for TachieItem.VideoEffects in the repo-local contract
motion library is the approved label-to-effect path for motion
motion write adapter is already proved for measured routes

manual_checks: Check intensity, repetition, and whether the motion steals focus from the line itself
limitations: This route is for speaker_tachie; do not widen it into the skit_group mainline

entries.preferred_route: IR slot -> slot_map -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: G-11 records slot patch as completed
slot changes are included in the tea-time E2E proof

manual_checks: Check final left/right staging and whether the scene stays readable
limitations: Slot positions remain registry-driven, not freeform creative layout synthesis

entries.preferred_route: IR transition=fade -> measured fade-family route -> patch-ymmp

evidence.reason: fade-family transition keys are part of the measured contract
fade-family transition is the confirmed route family in repo-local corpus
transition is patchable only for none/fade in the current adapter

manual_checks: Check whether the fade timing feels natural for the scene cut
limitations: Only fade is a production route today; other transition families remain outside the supported path

entries.preferred_route: Do not write directly from IR; redesign with fade or manual YMM4 authoring

evidence.reason: non-fade/template-backed transition families remain unmeasured in repo-local corpus
validate-ir treats non-fade transition labels as unknown for patch-time application

manual_checks: If a non-fade transition is still desired, re-measure the route and document it before implementation
limitations: Unsupported in the current production adapter

entries.preferred_route: Do not derive IR directly from raw effect names; choose a higher-level route first

evidence.reason: Capability Atlas explicitly treats effect atoms as a dictionary, not as a primary IR contract
effect_catalog is described as a pick-up source for registries, not a production IR schema

manual_checks: Translate the intent into motion/template/bg_anim/overlay/se before patching
limitations: Raw effect names are not a recommended production entrypoint
